CustomField.description: One Federal Decision track classification for this timeline event. Used to filter the OFD coordination dashboard by track type. NEPA_Lead = lead agency milestone; Agency_Consultation = cooperating agency coordination checkpoint; Permit_Milestone = dependent permit milestone (ESA 7, Section 404, Section 106); Joint_ROD = joint record of decision target. Blank = standard NEPA process event not part of OFD coordination.
CustomField.label: OFD Track
